summary: Plan-only classification: keep #90445 as the live canonical issue. Keep #90831 and #91682 related to the canonical family because they address useful but different UI surfaces and neither is safe to merge or close in this job.

actions.reason: #90445 remains the best surviving canonical because it is the open issue that describes the full user-facing clarification problem across the cluster.
#90831 is useful work in the canonical family, but it is not merge-ready and should not supersede or close other refs in this plan.
#91682 should stay open as related partial work for a distinct UI surface; it should not be closed as duplicate or superseded in this read-only plan.
